topics.title: Joe Piscopo Divorce and Musical Performance
topics.summary: The studio reviews a past television appearance by Joe Piscopo featuring his original songs about his former wife and discusses the details of his high-profile divorce.

topics.title: Infidelity, Jackass 2, and Celebrity Media
topics.summary: The studio discusses a caller's discovery of her husband's affair with a patient, the extreme stunts in Jackass 2, and various media appearances.

topics.title: Jackass Stunts and Media Industry News
topics.summary: The show features a discussion on the dangerous stunts performed in Jackass, the recent appearance of Rosie O'Donnell on The View, corporate shifts at Viacom, and new satellite technology.

topics.title: Stock Market Risks and Satellite Radio Growth
topics.summary: The studio discusses the risks of investing in startup companies, personal anecdotes about missed stock opportunities, the growth of satellite radio over traditional FM, and upcoming musical performances.

topics.title: Pop Culture and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including a Broadway musical featuring Bob Dylan's music, the Jackass film franchise, celebrity news regarding Tom Cruise and O.J. Simpson, and several listener-submitted recordings.

topics.title: Football Betting and Guest Selection
topics.summary: The studio discusses potential opponents for a $25,000 football betting contest, weighing options between various characters, animals, and high-profile figures.

topics.title: Disability and Upcoming Premiere
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with a quadriplegic man about his life and medical needs before transitioning into a discussion regarding an upcoming red carpet premiere.

topics.title: Movie Premiere Invitations and Karaoke Poll
topics.summary: The studio discusses the logistics of guest lists for an upcoming movie premiere, including some staff members being cut from the list, before transitioning to a listener poll regarding a karaoke competition.

topics.title: Stain Band Interview and Studio Experience
topics.summary: The studio hosts a discussion with the band Stained, covering their history, technical challenges during past performances, and the evolving landscape of the rock music industry.

topics.title: Impact of Digital Music and Karaoke Performances
topics.summary: The studio explores the negative effects of iPods on band loyalty and the music industry before transitioning into a live karaoke contest featuring performances by Artie and Robin.

topics.title: Musical Performance Contest and Guest Appearance
topics.summary: The studio hosts a singing competition among various participants before introducing a musical guest to perform.

topics.title: Stain Band Performance and Tour Life
topics.summary: The studio features the band Stained performing a song while discussing their touring experiences, marijuana use, family life, and upcoming album releases.

topics.title: Steve Irwin Death and Comedy Tour Plans
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming comedy tours, the dynamics of the "Killer Be Killed" show, and debates the safety risks associated with Steve Irwin’s career in wildlife television.

topics.title: Howard TV Expansion and Media News
topics.summary: The studio announces the expansion of Howard TV into several new markets, reviews popular segments on the platform, and discusses upcoming news stories including celebrity breakups and a tribute to Steve Irwin.

topics.title: Wildlife Safety and News Reports
topics.summary: The studio discusses the dangers of wildlife interaction, the health risks faced by 9/11 first responders, and reports of voyeurism involving hidden cameras in public facilities.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Entertainment Updates
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including celebrity legal issues, public appearances by Brad Pitt and Angelina Jolie, the debut of Katie Couric on the news, and upcoming comedy tours.
